name: Churu Creamy Lickable Cat Treats – Assorted Seafood Flavours (1 Tube)
shortDescription: I tube of Churu Cat Treat in chicken & seafood flavors. Creamy, low-calorie, high-moisture, taurine-enriched, perfect for handfeeding, bonding, and rewarding your cat.
description: Spoil your feline companion with the Churu Cat Treat – Chicken & Seafood Variety – Tube . Crafted from wholesome, high-quality ingredients, each lickable purée tube contains 91% moisture and only 6 calories , keeping your cat hydrated while delivering a delicious, guilt-free treat. Free from grains, preservatives, artificial colors, and carrageenan, these treats are enriched with taurine and Vitamin E , supporting heart health, vision, and overall wellbeing. Ideal for hand-feeding, as a topper for wet/dry food, or to disguise medication , this variety jar offers delicious diversity in every tube. Key Benefits Wholesome ingredients – Real chicken & seafood Hydration support – 91% moisture keeps cats healthy Low-calorie treat – Only 6 kcal per tube Free of bad stuff – No grains, preservatives, artificial colors, or carrageenan Enriched with Taurine & Vitamin E – Supports heart, vision, and immunity Convenient & interactive – Perfect for handfeeding, bonding, and treats anytime Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a meal replacement. Always provide clean water and supervise while feeding. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg, 6.0 kcal per tube (ME)
